title: BEM-905 operator gate
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/pilot/gates').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

required_inputs = [
  {'id':'real_business_segment','question':'Which business segment is selected for the first real pilot?'},
  {'id':'real_client_or_internal_product','question':'Which real client/product/repository is the pilot target?'},
  {'id':'pilot_objective','question':'What measurable business objective should the pilot prove?'},
  {'id':'success_metrics','question':'Which success thresholds are accepted for cycle time, manual actions, defects, traceability and proof coverage?'},
  {'id':'scope_boundary','question':'What is explicitly out of scope for the first pilot?'}
]
state = {
  'bem':'BEM-905',
  'status':'OPERATOR_GATE_REQUIRED',
  'reason':'technical preparation is complete; real pilot selection is strategic and cannot be chosen autonomously',
  'technical_readiness_proofs':[
    'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM889_REPOSITORY_READY.md',
    'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md',
    'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM901_PILOT_READINESS_PASS.md',
    'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM902_BMC_EVALUATOR_PASS.md',
    'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM903_PRODUCT_ONBOARDING_PASS.md',
    'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM904_EVALUATION_SLA_PASS.md'
  ],
  'operator_required_inputs':required_inputs
}
Path('governance/pilot/gates/BEM905_OPERATOR_PILOT_SELECTION_GATE.json').write_text(json.dumps(state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# BEM-905 Operator pilot selection gate\n\nStatus: OPERATOR_GATE_REQUIRED\n\nTechnical preparation is complete. The next step is a strategic business pilot choice and cannot be selected autonomously.\n\nRequired operator inputs:\n'
for item in required_inputs:
    md += '- ' + item['id'] + ': ' + item['question'] + '\n'
md += '\nTechnical readiness proofs:\n'
for p in state['technical_readiness_proofs']:
    md += '- ' + p + '\n'
Path('governance/pilot/gates/BEM905_OPERATOR_PILOT_SELECTION_GATE.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM905_OPERATOR_GATE.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM905_OPERATOR_GATE_REQUIRED.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-905 operator gate proof\nStatus: OPERATOR_GATE_REQUIRED\nReason: strategic real pilot selection required\n', encoding='utf-8')
curator = '# BEM-905 PILOT SELECTION RESPONSE\nStatus: OPERATOR_GATE_REQUIRED\n\nFindings:\n- Maximum autonomous execution before pilot selection is complete.\n- Technical pilot scaffold, BMC evaluator, product onboarding kit, evaluation dashboard and SLA template are ready.\n- Real pilot target/client/segment/objective/thresholds are strategic decisions and require operator.\n\nEvidence:\n- governance/pilot/gates/BEM905_OPERATOR_PILOT_SELECTION_GATE.md\n- ' + str(marker) + '\n\nRecommendation:\n- Operator should provide the required pilot-selection inputs, then autonomous execution can continue.\n'
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM905_PILOT_SELECTION_RESPONSE.md').write_text(curator, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/pilot/gates/BEM905_OPERATOR_PILOT_SELECTION_GATE.json','governance/pilot/gates/BEM905_OPERATOR_PILOT_SELECTION_GATE.md','governance/reports/BEM905_OPERATOR_GATE.md',str(marker),'governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM905_PILOT_SELECTION_RESPONSE.md'])
ops_applied.append('BEM905 operator gate required')
"""
